title: openAppFeatureIntegrations monday API unavailable anymore?

posts.author: wk_kong (Woon Kit Kong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Last time, when using monday.com javascript sdk, I can open an integration tab using monday.execute("openAppFeatureIntegrations", {boardId, appFeatureReferenceId})

But now this doesn’t seem to work, any idea for a workaround ?

Desired result: It will open up a tab with integration recipes that I have created

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @wk_kong,

Do you remember when was the last time you used this?

What you want to do is to open a new tab in the browser? Or open a modal with the integrations of an app?

posts.author: wk_kong (Woon Kit Kong)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to open a new modal with the integrations of an app

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @wk_kong,

I will double-check with the team about this.

I will let you know what they say.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I am very sorry for the late reply!

This method is working right now

Check this out!
